stories.title: Belgian GP Pre-Race Build-Up — Championship at Stake Under Spa's Skies

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Belgian Grand Prix is 4 days away.

Antonelli leads by 25 points. Hamilton is 32 back. Verstappen is out of the title race but far from irrelevant.

Spa is the last race before summer break.

This is the race that could define 2026. #F1 #BelgianGP

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Belgian GP weekend schedule:

🇧🇪 FP1: Friday
🇧🇪 Qualifying: Saturday
🇧🇪 Race: Sunday

50% rain chance Friday at Spa could scramble setup strategies heading into Saturday qualifying.

Last race before summer break. Buckle up. #F1 #BelgianGP

article.headline: Belgian GP Preview: Everything Is On the Line as F1's Three-Way Title Fight Arrives at Spa

Belgian GP Pre-Race Build-Up
**Key verified facts:**
- Belgian GP, Round 10, Spa-Francorchamps, July 17-19, 2026 (HIGH — confirmed from F1 calendar)
- FP1 Friday July 17, 13:30 local time (MEDIUM)
- Qualifying Saturday July 18, 16:00 local time (MEDIUM)
- Race Sunday July 19, 15:00 local time, 44 laps (MEDIUM)
- 50% rain Friday, 10-20% Saturday/Sunday (MEDIUM — research weather)
- Championship standings after Round 9 (British GP): Antonelli 179 / Russell 154 / Hamilton 147 / Leclerc 108 (MEDIUM — from research)
- Last race before summer break (HIGH — standard F1 calendar fact)
- Verstappen 76 pts, 103 pts off the lead (MEDIUM)

stories.title: Hamilton's Title Math — 32 Points Behind With Spa Momentum on His Side

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Lewis Hamilton is 41 years old.

He is 32 points behind the championship leader.

Spa has historically been one of his best circuits.

At this point in his career, in this situation — you don't bet against him. #F1 #LewisHamilton

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Championship math heading into Belgium:

Antonelli: 179 pts
Russell: 154 pts
Hamilton: 147 pts

32 points separate Hamilton and the lead. Hamilton's Ferrari won at Silverstone.

The title fight is absolutely alive. #F1 #BelgianGP

article.headline: Hamilton Is 32 Points Behind With Spa Ahead — History Says Don't Count Him Out

research.facts:
Hamilton's Title Math
**Key verified facts:**
- Hamilton finished P3 at Silverstone (MEDIUM — British GP results)
- Hamilton is 32 points behind Antonelli (179 - 147 = 32) (MEDIUM — calculated from standings)
- Hamilton is 41 years old (HIGH — widely confirmed)
- Hamilton drives for Ferrari in 2026 (HIGH — widely confirmed)
- Spa is historically strong for Hamilton — he has won there multiple times (HIGH — historical record)
- Silverstone sprint: Antonelli beat Hamilton (MEDIUM)
- Antonelli had wheel failure at Silverstone main race, finished P11 after penalty (MEDIUM)
- Hamilton is racing in potential final championship campaign (MEDIUM — contextual)
**Flags:**
- Exact Spa win count for Hamilton: do not specify a number without verification — use "multiple times" or "one of his best circuits"

stories.title: Verstappen-McLaren Talks in Closing Stages — Red Bull Exit Decision Due Before Hungary

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Max Verstappen and McLaren are in the "closing stages" of contract negotiations, per multiple paddock sources.

Red Bull offered €8 million to buy out his exit clause. He said no.

The biggest driver move in years is happening. #F1 #Verstappen

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
Verstappen's Red Bull exit clause is active. He cannot finish in the top 2 in the championship entering the summer break.

A McLaren deal could be announced before the season ends.

Norris. Piastri. Now Verstappen? What a lineup that would be. #F1

article.headline: Verstappen and McLaren in Closing Stages of Deal — Red Bull's Buyout Refused, Exit Clock Ticking

research.facts:
Verstappen-McLaren Talks
**Key verified facts:**
- Multiple paddock sources: Verstappen and McLaren in "closing stages" of negotiations (MEDIUM — research summary, multiple sources)
- Exit clause triggers if Verstappen outside top-2 in championship at start of summer break (MEDIUM)
- After British GP crash, Verstappen mathematically cannot finish top-2 entering summer break (MEDIUM)
- Red Bull offered €8 million to buy out clause — Verstappen refused (MEDIUM)
- Verstappen must formally notify Red Bull by October 2026 at latest (MEDIUM)
- Verstappen 7th in championship with 76 points (MEDIUM)
- Verstappen described British GP crash at Stowe corner as "super dangerous" (MEDIUM)
- Norris contracted at McLaren through 2027 (MEDIUM)
- Piastri contracted at McLaren through 2028 (MEDIUM)
**Flags:**
- McLaren lineup restructure if Verstappen joins: do not speculate specifically about who gets dropped without confirmed source

stories.title: FIA Thermal Loophole — What the Mid-Season Engine Rule Change Really Means

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
F1's mid-season engine rule change is bigger than it looks.

The FIA changed how compression ratios are measured after rivals flagged a thermal loophole that may have benefited manufacturers in the first half of the season.

No retroactive penalties. The debate isn't over. #F1

article.headline: The FIA Changed F1's Engine Rules Mid-Season — Here's What the Thermal Loophole Story Really Means

image_concepts.label: Image
image_concepts.raw:
FIA Thermal Loophole

#### Image Concept 1 — Social (1080x1350)
- **Search term:** FIA Formula 1 technical
- **Usage:** Afternoon X/FB post
- **Caption overlay:** "MID-SEASON RULE CHANGE" / "The Thermal Loophole Explained"

#### Image Concept 2 — Article Hero (1200x630)
- **Search term:** Formula 1 engine power unit
- **Usage:** Article featured image

---

research.facts:
FIA Thermal Loophole
**Key verified facts:**
- 2026 regulations set maximum compression ratio of 16:1 (MEDIUM)
- Original rules: measured at ambient temperature only (MEDIUM)
- Allegation: certain manufacturers designed components to thermally expand, raising on-track compression ratio beyond limit while passing cold static tests (MEDIUM)
- Teams flagged: Mercedes and Red Bull (by rival engine manufacturers) (MEDIUM)
- FIA response: two-temperature measurement protocol from June 1, 2026 (MEDIUM)
- Measurement: ambient AND 130°C (MEDIUM)
- No retroactive penalties issued (MEDIUM)
- Outside counsel investigating (MEDIUM — consistent with broader reporting)
**Flags:**
- "Teams under scrutiny" — MEDIUM confidence; frame as "rival manufacturers flagged" not as confirmed guilt
- Do not state as fact that Mercedes/Red Bull "cheated" — it's an allegation being investigated

stories.title: Bortoleto and the Audi Story Nobody is Telling — P8 at Silverstone and Building

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Gabriel Bortoleto finished P8 at Silverstone for Audi.

The 22-year-old Brazilian is performing above expectations in just his first F1 season.

Audi's debut year is going better than almost anyone predicted. This is a story worth following. #F1
